name: Aryan Sharma
headline: Game Tester & Game Level Designer (Unreal Engine / Unity)
summary: Fresher with ~3 years of level design practice. Familiar with a wide range of game genres and player perspectives (FPS, TPS, 2D, world-building, strategy, action-adventure).
about: I focus on player-first level flow: readable spaces, clear goals, and iteration based on play behavior.
As a game tester, I’m comfortable with structured testing workflows and terminology, including TRCs and XRs, and I’m familiar with devkits/test kits, Neighborhood, and Prospero.
I’m currently learning full‑stack Python development. In game development practice, I’ve worked with gameplay mechanics using C++ and C# and I’m familiar with version control.

highlights.title: Level Design
highlights.description: Grey-boxing, timing challenges, and traversal flow.

highlights.title: Engines
highlights.description: Blueprint/visual scripting and core gameplay systems.

highlights.title: Testing
highlights.description: Structured testing workflows and platform compliance awareness.

highlights.title: Programming
highlights.description: Gameplay mechanics + DSA fundamentals; learning full‑stack Python.

timeline.title: B.Tech (Graduation)
bullets: Built fundamentals in engineering and problem-solving.
Continued parallel learning in level design and game development.

timeline.title: Level Designer (Self-driven practice)
bullets: Designed multiple levels and maps across Unreal Engine and Unity.
Iterated on pacing, readability, and player navigation through hands-on prototyping.
